title: viola × yachigii
intro: Viola × yachigii, also known as Japanese yellow violet or Fragrant violet, is a hybrid plant species of the Viola genus, characterized by its unique yellow and purple flowers. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Viola × yachigii include potential relief from anxiety, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
